ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investment */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain protocol */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yield farming protocol */,
  "apy" REAL /* Annual percentage yield (APY) */,
  "apy_type" TEXT /* Type of APY (e.g., nominal, effective) */,
  "tvl" INTEGER /* Total value locked (TVL) */,
  "risk" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the investment opportunity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the investment (e.g., stablecoin, high-yield) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain protocol */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain protocol */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the blockchain protocol */,
  "block_explorer" TEXT /* Block explorer URL for the blockchain protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blockchain protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blockchain protocol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield farming protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the yield farming protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the yield farming protocol */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the yield farming protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the yield farming protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the yield farming protocol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., admin, investor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment in the portfolio */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "amount_invested" REAL /* Amount invested in the investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment return */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was calculated */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount of the return */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_returns_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment metric */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., APY, TVL) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., percentage, absolute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_metrics_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_comments_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_updates_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_tags_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
